item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan memang penting, tapi hak individu pun tidak boleh dilupakan.

notes: Both agents keep their cultural frames while moving toward balance. Agent A starts clearly pro-society, then adds individual-rights caveats and ends with a holistic balance. Agent B starts rights-first from a US constitutional frame, then concedes that limits can apply for significant public safety or justice risks. Indonesian text is readable with minor awkward phrasing such as "Sistim".
